creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can't reproduce in a pristine jail. Provide more details (e.g. lossless screenshot or lossy video stating original resolution/dpi, X resources, Gtk settings, window manager, X11 driver) and try to bisect Firefox (major) releases. Does it happen with both GTK2 and GTK3? This is probably better reported upstream as upstream have more expertise debugging UI issues.

Firefox 52.0.2 is out of date, either switch to www/firefox-esr to retain GTK2 or upgrade to 53.0.
